mapper.insert: insert into inventory_adjustment_review_request( review_no, review_status, policy_id, policy_snapshot_json, stock_id, stock_key, spu_id, sku_id, seller_id, system_sku_code, product_name, sku_name, warehouse_kind, warehouse_ref_type, warehouse_name, adjust_field, adjust_direction, request_before_platform_total_qty, requested_adjust_qty, request_expected_after_platform_total_qty, platform_reserved_qty_snapshot, sales_7d_qty, sales_7d_daily_avg, sales_30d_qty, sales_30d_daily_avg, threshold_daily_avg, threshold_reserve_days, protected_retained_qty, min_retained_qty, immediate_returnable_qty, trigger_reason, submit_terminal, submit_user_id, submit_user_name, submit_reason, submit_time, planned_effective_time, version, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{reviewNo}, #{reviewStatus}, #{policyId}, coalesce(#{policySnapshotJson}, ''), #{stockId}, #{stockKey}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{sellerId}, coalesce(#{systemSkuCode}, ''), coalesce(#{productName}, ''), coalesce(#{skuName}, ''), #{warehouseKind}, #{warehouseRefType}, coalesce(#{warehouseName}, ''), #{adjustField}, #{adjustDirection}, #{requestBeforePlatformTotalQty}, #{requestedAdjustQty}, #{requestExpectedAfterPlatformTotalQty}, #{platformReservedQtySnapshot}, #{sales7dQty}, #{sales7dDailyAvg}, #{sales30dQty}, #{sales30dDailyAvg}, #{thresholdDailyAvg}, #{thresholdReserveDays}, #{protectedRetainedQty}, #{minRetainedQty}, #{immediateReturnableQty}, #{triggerReason}, #{submitTerminal}, #{submitUserId}, #{submitUserName}, coalesce(#{submitReason}, ''), #{submitTime}, #{plannedEffectiveTime}, 0, #{createBy}, sysdate(), coalesce(#{remark}, '') )
mapper.update: update inventory_adjustment_review_request set review_status = #{reviewStatus}, effective_time = #{effectiveTime}, effective_operator_id = #{effectiveOperatorId}, effective_operator_name = #{effectiveOperatorName}, effective_before_platform_total_qty = #{effectiveBeforePlatformTotalQty}, actual_effect_qty = #{actualEffectQty}, unfulfilled_qty = #{unfulfilledQty}, effective_after_platform_total_qty = #{effectiveAfterPlatformTotalQty}, review_reason = coalesce(#{reviewReason}, ''), version = version + 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where review_id = #{reviewId} and version = #{version}

update inventory_adjustment_review_request set planned_effective_time = #{plannedEffectiveTime}, review_reason = coalesce(#{reviewReason}, ''), version = version + 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where review_id = #{reviewId} and version = #{version}
mapper.select: select * from inventory_adjustment_review_operation_log where review_id = #{reviewId} order by operate_time desc, log_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into inventory_adjustment_review_operation_log( review_id, review_no, operation_type, before_status, after_status, operation_reason, operator_id, operator_name, operate_time, change_summary, create_time, remark ) values ( #{reviewId}, #{reviewNo}, #{operationType}, coalesce(#{beforeStatus}, ''), coalesce(#{afterStatus}, ''), coalesce(#{operationReason}, ''), #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operateTime}, coalesce(#{changeSummary}, ''), sysdate(), coalesce(#{remark}, '') )
mapper.select: select r.* from inventory_adjustment_review_request r left join inventory_adjustment_review_policy p on p.policy_id = r.policy_id where r.review_status = 'WAITING' and r.planned_effective_time is not null and r.planned_effective_time <= #{now} and coalesce(p.auto_effect_enabled, 'Y') = 'Y' order by r.planned_effective_time asc, r.review_id asc limit #{limit}

select p.* from inventory_adjustment_review_policy p join inventory_adjustment_review_policy_binding b on b.policy_id = p.policy_id where p.policy_status = 'ENABLED' and b.status = 'ENABLED' and ( (b.binding_type = 'SELLER' and b.binding_id_value = #{sellerId}) or b.binding_type = 'GLOBAL' ) order by case b.binding_type when 'SELLER' then 1 else 2 end, b.priority asc, b.binding_id asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into inventory_adjustment_review_policy( policy_name, policy_status, review_mode, direction_scope, field_scope, sales_window_days, sales_aggregate_mode, reserve_days, cooldown_hours, min_return_qty_to_review, min_return_ratio_to_review, auto_effect_enabled, manual_effect_allowed, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{policyName}, #{policyStatus}, #{reviewMode}, #{directionScope}, #{fieldScope}, #{salesWindowDays}, #{salesAggregateMode}, #{reserveDays}, #{cooldownHours}, #{minReturnQtyToReview}, #{minReturnRatioToReview}, #{autoEffectEnabled}, #{manualEffectAllowed}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), coalesce(#{remark}, '') )
mapper.update: update inventory_adjustment_review_policy set policy_name = #{policyName}, policy_status = #{policyStatus}, review_mode = #{reviewMode}, direction_scope = #{directionScope}, field_scope = #{fieldScope}, sales_window_days = #{salesWindowDays}, sales_aggregate_mode = #{salesAggregateMode}, reserve_days = #{reserveDays}, cooldown_hours = #{cooldownHours}, min_return_qty_to_review = #{minReturnQtyToReview}, min_return_ratio_to_review = #{minReturnRatioToReview}, auto_effect_enabled = #{autoEffectEnabled}, manual_effect_allowed = #{manualEffectAllowed}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = coalesce(#{remark}, '') where policy_id = #{policyId}

update inventory_adjustment_review_policy_binding set policy_id = #{policyId}, binding_type = #{bindingType}, binding_id_value = #{bindingIdValue}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = coalesce(#{remark}, '') where binding_id = #{bindingId}
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(sold_qty), 0) from inventory_sku_sales_daily where sku_id = #{skuId} and stat_date >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) and stat_date < curdate()
